scripts.dev: pnpm build:shared && concurrently -n "shared,auth,chat,file,gate,meet,proj,trans,front" -c "gray,blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan,red,white,black" "pnpm watch:shared" "pnpm --filter loopy-auth dev" "pnpm --filter loopy-chat dev" "pnpm --filter loopy-file dev" "pnpm --filter loopy-gateway dev" "pnpm --filter loopy-meeting dev" "pnpm --filter loopy-project dev" "pnpm --filter loopy-transcription dev" "pnpm --filter loopy-frontend dev"
